{{Quote|Trehla can show you what you need to know. She's got no love for Jabba, that's for sure.|[[Vourk ver'Zremp]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TFS2">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|The First Step|Tatooine}}</ref>}}
'''Trehla Keelo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Welcome to Mos Eisley. Watch your back here. There has never been a more wretched hive of scum and villainy, as you may have heard.|Trehla Keelo, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TFS" />}}
Trehla Keelo resided in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. During that time, she used to spend a lot of time near the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] from where she tried to help [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] and newcomers in Mos Eisley to be more familiar with the city that she considered as a hive of scum and villainy.<ref name="SWG:TFS" /> Thanks to her numerous and varied acquaintances, including [[Mayor/Legends|Mayor]] [[Mikdanyell Guh'rantt]],<ref name="SWG:TtMG">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=general|Talk to Mayor Guh'rantt|Tatooine}}</ref> the [[entertainer]] [[Allura]], the [[Medic/Legends|medic]] [[Kazen Harn]],<ref name="SWG:TfaB">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=general|Time for a Break|Tatooine}}</ref> and the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] Gendra,<ref name="SWG:FT">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Find Trehla|Tatooine}}</ref> she also helped these spacers to find a respectable profession.<ref name="SWG:TfaB" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Trehla Keelo started to work with a spacer who just arrived on Tatooine after escaping an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] with the help of one of her acquaintances [[Darex Rath]].<ref name="SWG:OtME">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=general|On to Mos Eisley|Imperial Space Station}}</ref> With the assistance of the spacer, she discovered that [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] were gathering near Mos Eisley in order to attack the city. After a skirmish with the Tuskens in [[Junktown]],<ref name="SWG:TuA">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=general|Taking up Arms|Tatooine}}</ref> she dispatched a spacer to travel to [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] to inform the [[Journalist/Legends|journalist]] [[Trace Lyson]] about the situation.<ref name="SWG:TJO">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=general|The Journey Onward|Tatooine}}</ref> It was later discovered that the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] was inciting the Tusken Raiders to attack Mos Eisley in order to pressurize the mayor of Mos Eisley and eventually take control of the city.<ref name="SWG:TEL">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=class|Entertainer|The Entertainer's Life|Tatooine}}</ref>

Trehla Keelo was also acquainted with [[Vourk ver'Zremp]], who was working in [[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's criminal empire]]. Although she despised the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] crime lord, she tried to assist anyway individuals forced to work for the Hutt. Vourk ver'Zremp therefore often referred new Jabba henchmen to her.<ref name="SWG:FT" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> she also helped a spacer who arrived on Tatooine with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] from [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]].<ref name="SWG:TFS2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Trehla Keelo was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TFS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>

Trehla Keelo was added to the game with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 17 Notes for 26 May 2005|Publish 17]]," on [[May 26]], [[2005]].<ref name="SWG:2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> She provided several introductory quests to help new players who spawned on Tatooine right after the completion of the "New Player Tutorial" to chose their "[[W:c:swg:Professions (pre-NGE)|profession]]."<ref name="SWG:TFS" /><ref name="SWG:TuA" /><ref name="SWG:TfaB" /><ref name="SWG:TAoB">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=general|The Art of Business|Tatooine}}</ref><ref name="SWG:TJO" /> However, the beginning of the game was widely revamped upon the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], 2005,<ref name="SWG:2005" /> and Trehla Keelo's questline was replaced by one single skippable and very basic beginner quest.<ref name="SWG:TFS2" />
